Original: can provide you with [Resources|RESOURCE] useful in [Training|TRAIN], [Construction|CONSTRUCT], and trade. You can [Harvest|HARVEST] them through [Foraging|FORAGE] or by Constructing [Structures|STRUCTURE] on them.
Translation: 可提供用于[训练|TRAIN]、[建造|CONSTRUCT]和贸易的[资源|RESOURCE]。你可以通过[采集|FORAGE]，或在其上建造[建筑|STRUCTURE]来[采收|HARVEST]。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip text preserving concept IDs.

Original: [Plants|PLANT] are Harvested by [Farms|FARM], [Animal Herds|ANIMAL] by [Pastures|PASTURE], and [Minerals|MINERAL] by [Mines|MINE].
Translation: [植物|PLANT]由[农场|FARM]采收，[兽群|ANIMAL]由[牧场|PASTURE]采收，[矿物|MINERAL]由[矿井|MINE]采掘。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip text preserving concept IDs.

Original: [TIMBER] is Harvested from
Translation: [TIMBER]采自
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip fragment preserving resource token.

Original: both on and NEXT TO [LOGGING-CAMP-1:S], rather than from specific
Translation: 既可在[LOGGING-CAMP-1:S]所在格，也可在其相邻格采收，而非来自特定
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip fragment preserving structure token.

Original: of the appropriate
Translation: 相应
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip fragment.

Original: : Farms by the [FARMER], Pastures by the [RANCHER], Mines by the [MINER], and so on.
Translation: ：农场由[农夫|FARMER]运作，牧场由[牧场主|RANCHER]运作，矿井由[矿工|MINER]运作，依此类推。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip text preserving concept IDs.

Original: The Clan can return to the map at any time, but the Structure is destroyed in the process.
Translation: 该氏族可随时回到地图上，但建筑会在此过程中被毁。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip text.

Original: are eventually [Depleted|DEGRADE] after a couple of years as the supply of [Resources|RESOURCE] on its
Translation: 会在数年后因其
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip fragment preserving nearby concept context in following tokens.

Original: is used up.
Translation: 上的[资源|RESOURCE]耗尽而最终[枯竭|DEGRADE]。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip fragment completing depleted-resource sentence.

Original: You will eventually need to migrate in search of new
Translation: 你最终需要迁徙，寻找新的
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip fragment.

Original: to Harvest - but don't worry, that day still lies far in the future!
Translation: 来采收，但别担心，那一天还很遥远！
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog help tip fragment.

Original: Now that you have a few
Translation: 既然你已有几个
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip fragment.

Original: under your belt, let's talk a little bit about the economy of AtG.
Translation: 在手，我们来谈谈 AtG 的经济。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip fragment.

Original: Most types of Units require 1,000 Villagers, and also eat 1 Food per turn.
Translation: 大多数单位需要 1000 名村民，并且每回合消耗 1 食物。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.

Original: These are the 'gifts' that help grease the wheels of government and secure the loyalty of your lieutenants.
Translation: 这些就是帮助政务运转、确保副手忠诚的“礼物”。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.

Original: The more you have, the more Resources you can collect from a larger area, but don't build so many that you go bankrupt!
Translation: 数量越多，你能从更大范围收集的资源也越多，但别建太多，以免破产！
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.

Original: The Villagers who live in your Settlements also create Treasure through taxation. The larger a Settlement gets the more cash it produces. So what do you do with that money?
Translation: 定居点中的村民也会通过税收创造财富。定居点越大，产出的现金越多。那么这些钱该用来做什么？
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.

Original: Specialized Professions like the Explorer and Surveyor are in high demand even during the Dark Ages, and aren't willing to work for free.
Translation: 探索者、勘测员这类专门职业，即使在黑暗时代也很抢手，而且不会免费效力。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.

Original: Early on, growing one or two Settlements nice and big (~6,000 Villagers) is the most reliable way to pay for those salaries.
Translation: 早期把一两个定居点发展到足够规模（约 6000 名村民），是支付这些薪酬最可靠的方法。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.

Original: You can also bring in more Treasure by moving your Settlements onto rivers and coastlines, where they benefit from trade.
Translation: 也可以把定居点迁到河流与海岸旁，借助贸易带来更多财富。
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.

Original: Should you ever find a source of Gold or Gems you can kiss your financial troubles goodbye! Well, for a little while, anyways!
Translation: 如果找到黄金或宝石来源，你就能暂时告别财政麻烦。至少短时间内如此！
Note: Trial UI exact-catalog city economy help tip text.
